---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What's frustrating today?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Mockups / Examples

If applicable, add mockups, sketches, or examples from other tools.

## Who Benefits

Who would use this feature? (admins, developers, architects, consultants, etc.)

## Would You Contribute?

- [ ] I'd be willing to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] I can help test this feature
- [ ] I can help with documentation
